title: 建筑空间场景图
description:
案例「atmosphere」属于建筑/空间。这是一张建筑/空间类案例，重点在空间结构、材质、光影、环境氛围和设计概念。适合改成建筑概念图、室内设计、展厅、商业空间、民宿或未来城市视觉。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A highly detailed, 电影感 wide shot of a grand, dark gothic hall with a 【atmosphere：dark fantasy】 aesthetic. In the center, a single figure wearing a 【clothing：long white robe】 kneels on a highly reflective stone floor, facing an ornate golden altar illuminated by a row of lit candles. To the right of the kneeling figure, a single 【floor object：wooden violin】 rests on the ground. The cavernous room is framed by massive dark stone pillars detailed with 【accent color：glowing blue】 ethereal cracks and veins. Suspended from the high ceiling are dozens of 【floating objects：white porcelain theatrical masks】 hanging on thin strings, filling the upper half of the space and creating a haunting, surreal atmosphere. The 光线ing is dramatic and moody, featuring a rich color palette of deep blacks, tarnished golds, and cool blue accents. Format 16:9.
prompt_raw: A highly detailed, cinematic wide shot of a grand, dark gothic hall with a dark fantasy aesthetic. In the center, a single figure wearing a long white robe kneels on a highly reflective stone floor, facing an ornate golden altar illuminated by a row of lit candles. To the right of the kneeling figure, a single wooden violin rests on the ground. The cavernous room is framed by massive dark stone pillars detailed with glowing blue ethereal cracks and veins. Suspended from the high ceiling are dozens of white porcelain theatrical masks hanging on thin strings, filling the upper half of the space and creating a haunting, surreal atmosphere. The lighting is dramatic and moody, featuring a rich color palette of deep blacks, tarnished golds, and cool blue accents. Format 16:9.

In the center, a single figure wearing a 【clothing：long white robe】 kneels on a highly reflective stone floor, facing an ornate golden altar illuminated by a row of lit candles. The cavernous room is framed by massive dark stone pillars detailed with 【accent color：glowing blue】 ethereal cracks and veins. The 光线ing is dramatic and moody, featuring a rich color palette of deep blacks, tarnished golds, and cool blue accents. Format 16:9.
prompt_template_cn:
设计一张【空间/建筑名称】的建筑空间视觉图。

空间类型：
这是一个【空间类型】，位于【环境/地点】，服务于【使用人群/功能】。

设计概念：
核心设计理念是【设计概念】，整体气质为【空间气质】。

空间元素：
画面中包含【主要结构】、【材质】、【家具/装置】、【景观/自然元素】等内容。

光影与氛围：
采用【时间/光线】，氛围为【氛围关键词】，色彩为【主色调】。

镜头构图：
使用【镜头视角】，突出空间纵深、尺度和材质细节。

输出要求：
画面高质量，像建筑表现图或空间设计提案，比例为【画面比例】。
variables_json: [{"key":"field_1","label":"空间/建筑名称","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入空间/建筑名称","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_2","label":"空间类型","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入空间类型","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_3","label":"环境/地点","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入环境/地点","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_4","label":"使用人群/功能","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入使用人群/功能","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_5","label":"设计概念","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入设计概念","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_6","label":"空间气质","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入空间气质","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_7","label":"主要结构","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主要结构","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_8","label":"材质","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入材质","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_9","label":"家具/装置","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入家具/装置","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_10","label":"景观/自然元素","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入景观/自然元素","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_11","label":"时间/光线","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入时间/光线","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_12","label":"氛围关键词","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入氛围关键词","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_13","label":"主色调","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主色调","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_14","label":"镜头视角","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入镜头视角","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_15","label":"画面比例","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入画面比例","required":true,"type":"text"}]
